name: Diane Rabbit
description: Diane Rabbit is a wide rabbit woman in her late 60s that lives with her son Junior and her granddaughter Audrey, after retiring from Bartleby's Bakery with 37 years of serving clients she enjoys life with her family, only dealing with the occassional yearly visit of The Man from the Window trying to kidnap any of them, only to fail every year. The game and the character were both made by Zed_The_Technician
creator: PeachesLovingBnuy
